{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 3.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 3.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-367", "name": "Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition"}], "description": "### Duplicate Advisory
This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-mj6p-44ch-cq69. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
The mkdir utility in uutils coreutils incorrectly applies permissions when using the -m flag by creating a directory with umask-derived permissions (typically 0755) before subsequently changing them to the requested mode via a separate chmod system call. In multi-user environments, this introduces a brief window where a directory intended to be private is accessible to other users, potentially leading to unauthorized data access.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-vf87-345h-9qhx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-29T23:22:16Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vf87-345h-9qhx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-vf87-345h-9qhx"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T17:16:37Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T18:31:45Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35353", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/pull/10036", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/releases/tag/0.6.0", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/commit/037b9583bc03d814e8516df54ebcda6f681fe1f8", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vf87-345h-9qhx"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: uutils coreutils has a Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-06T20:16:07Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-vf87-345h-9qhx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.6.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "coreutils"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.6.0"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-07-06T20:16:07Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: uutils coreutils has a Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition
